song.title: Oh Trust Thyself to Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Oh, trust thyself to Jesus When conscious of thy sin, Its heavy weight upon thee, Its mighty pow’r within:|| Then is the hour for pleading His finished work for thee: Then is the time for singing, His blood was shed for me.
[V2] 2) Oh, trust thyself to Jesus When tempted to transgress, By word or look of anger, Or thought of bitterness:|| Then is the hour for claiming Thy Lord to fight for thee: Then is the time for singing, He doth deliver me.
[V3] 3) Oh, trust thyself to Jesus When daily cares perplex, And trifles seem so mighty Thy inner soul to vex:|| Then is the hour for grasping His hand who walked the sea: Then is the time for singing, He makes it calm for me.
[V4] 4) Oh, trust thyself to Jesus When thou art wearied sore, When head or hand refuses To think or labor more:|| Then is the hour for leaning Upon the Master’s breast: Then is the time for singing, My Savior gives me rest.
